title: Cnv_Upstream Statement
parameters:
conveyorNumber	Integer expression representing the conveyor number (1 ~ 16)

upperLimit	A border on the upperstream side of the tracking area
description:
Cnv_Upstream Statement

Cnv_Upstream Statement

See_Also Example

Sets the upperstream limit of the specified conveyor.
see_also:
Cnv_Upstream Function

Cnv_Upstream Statement Example

Cnv_Upstream 1, 200
